# Time's Up! Bike Co-op

> DIY bike repair workshop in NYC's East Village. Volunteer mechanics provide guidance and tools to assist your bike repair.

## Location
626 East 14th St, New York, NY 10009

## Hours
Sunday & Wednesday, 5pm - 8pm

## Cost
Suggested $2 donation covers tool use and supplies.

## Services
- Hands-on bike repair guidance from volunteer mechanics
- Tools and workspace provided
- Used parts available onsite ($5-$10 for most secondhand parts)
- Used commuter bikes for sale (~$160)
- Limited stock of new parts

## How It Works
Bring your bike and describe the issue to a volunteer mechanic. You do the repair with their guidance. No appointment needed. Sign in when you arrive.

## Important Notes
- Beginner friendly, no experience needed
- No e-bikes
- No new projects 30 minutes before closing
- Personal bikes are not stored overnight
- Some repairs may take multiple visits

## Contact
Email: contact@timesup.bike

## Tools & Supplies Available
The co-op provides tools and supplies for DIY bike repair. Visual guide: https://timesup.bike/tools

### By the sink
- Air compressor — seats tubeless tires, removes bar grips, dries hands
- Vise — general purpose holding and leverage
- Garden sprayer — cleans bike
- Paper towel (quick release)

### Pegboard
- External bottom bracket tool
- Cone wrenches — for wheel hub locknuts
- Third hand tool — for shift/brake cable adjustments
- Master link pliers
- Chain checker, chain tool, chainring nut wrench
- Hammers & mallets
- Bolt cutters
- Assorted hand tools (wrenches, pliers, hammers, scissors)

### Backroom
- Wheel holder — holds wheel by axle for hub work
- Bottom brackets
- Used components (~$5, bins in backroom)
- Assorted small parts (organized by size)
- Assorted nuts & bolts
- Inner tubes (new and used)
- Lubricants, degreasers, disposable gloves
- Wheel truing stands (one mounted, two mobile)
- Chain scrubber, grease gun
- Loose ball bearings
- Ferrules — caps cables & housing
- Drop handlebars
- Flat handlebars
- Torque wrench (large) — for cranks and bottom brackets, above the socket drawer
- Ratchet & sockets — 1/4", 3/8" and 1/2" drivers, red drawer
- Grinder, dremel, angle grinder — upper shelf

### Front area (Pan-Am cabinet)
- Derailleur hanger alignment guide
- Crown race setter & cup remover
- Headset press
- Taps (use with cutting fluid)
- Punches
- Cheater bars (small and large)
- Calipers & rulers — in rulers drawer
- Brake bleed kit (Shimano, mineral oil) — top shelf
- Threaded steerer die — in taps/die drawer
- Disposable gloves
- Grease gun (floats between Pan-Am cabinet and backroom)

### Other locations
- Hacksaw, saw guide — under the fridge
- Star nut setter, BB/cassette/crank tools — cabinet under truing stands
- Tires — loft and top shelf of backroom
- Bike frames — basement
- Torque wrench (small), tension meter — ask a volunteer
- Donation box — backroom and front room table
- Front & rear racks — small room past the sink
- Bar end plugs, wheel axle parts, quick release skewers, drills — sliding cabinet opposite the sink
- Garden sprayer — by the window near the sink

## Spoke Cards
A gallery of spoke cards, stickers, and zines collected around NYC cycling events: https://timesup.bike/spoke_cards
